params.Description: As long as enchanted creature is black, it gets +1/+1 and has deathtouch. (Any amount of damage it deals to a creature is enough to destroy that creature.)

params.AddHiddenKeyword: All creatures able to block CARDNAME do so.
params.Description: As long as enchanted creature is green, it gets +1/+1 and all creatures able to block it do so.
